name: Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven to the appropriate temperature for convection heating.
2. Cream together the shortening, peanut butter, sugars, and eggs until well combined.
3. Gradually add in the salt, milk, flour, and baking soda, mixing until a dough forms.
4. Shape the dough into cookies and place them on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake for 10 minutes or until golden brown, adjusting time as necessary based on your oven's performance.
6. Turn off the oven and allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheets before transferring them to a wire rack.
